name: hangvidu
description: P2P video chat with watch-together mode
author: Kristinn Roach

scripts.build: pnpm p2p:prod && pnpm ts && VITE_HANGVIDU_API_URL=https://api.hangvidu.com vp build
scripts.dev: pnpm kill:silent && VITE_HANGVIDU_API_URL=https://localhost:8788 concurrently -k -n vite,cloudflare "vp dev" "pnpm dev:cf"
scripts.dev:mobile: pnpm kill:silent && VITE_HANGVIDU_API_URL=https://api.hangvidu.com concurrently -k -n vite,tunnel "vp dev" "cloudflared --no-autoupdate tunnel --config /dev/null --url https://localhost:5173 --no-tls-verify run vidu-dev"
scripts.p2p:prod: readlink node_modules/@kidlib/p2p | grep -q .pnpm || (pnpm unlink @kidlib/p2p && pnpm install)
scripts.deploy:fb: pnpm build && pnpm test:compat && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm build && pnpm install:fb:functions && pnpm test:compat && firebase deploy
scripts.deploy:all:skip-tests: pnpm build && pnpm install:fb:functions && firebase deploy
scripts.check:deployment: if curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X POST https://europe-west1-vidu-aae11.cloudfunctions.net/sendCallNotification | grep -E '400|401|405' -q; then echo '✅ Cloud Function is ready'; else echo '❌ Cloud Function not ready'; exit 1; fi
scripts.play:rtdb-live: fkill :8080 :8081 --silent; node --env-file=.env.development ./playgrounds/rtdb-proxy.js & python3 -m http.server 8080 --directory . & sleep 0.5 && open http://localhost:8080/playgrounds/rtdb-live.html && wait
scripts.play:boundaries: pnpm play:boundaries:scan && fkill :8082 --silent; python3 -m http.server 8082 --directory . & sleep 0.5 && open http://localhost:8082/playgrounds/boundary-rules.html && wait
scripts.preview: pnpm kill:silent && pnpm build && concurrently -k -n preview,tunnel "vp preview" "cloudflared tunnel run vidu-dev"
scripts.test:compat: vp test --run --project node && COMPAT=true vp test --run --project browser
